message:
Implement Descriptor Protocol (5 functions)

DESCRIPTOR PROTOCOL COMPLETE ✅

Functions (5):
==============

Generic Access:
- PyObject_GenericGetAttr - Generic __get__
- PyObject_GenericSetAttr - Generic __set__

String Attribute Access:
- PyObject_GetAttrString - Get by C string
- PyObject_SetAttrString - Set by C string
- PyObject_DelAttrString - Delete by C string

What This Enables:
==================

- Property-like attribute access
- Descriptor protocol support
- String-based attribute operations
- Used extensively by NumPy properties
